chain"]}],["$","li","l-45-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":["binds the plan to one proposal through a dedicated PDA"]}],["$","li","l-45-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":["keeps only passes and clears timelock"]}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-5",{"children":["$","h2","h2-52",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":["What Stays on-chain. The encrypted manifest remains off-chain. The chain only exposes immutable hashes and settlement metadata so operators and reviewers can verify that the approved batch and the executed batch still refer to the same encrypted package."]}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","h2","h2-65",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":["Current Security Boundary"]}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","p","p-70",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["The current confidential payout path is honest about its boundary:"]}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","ul","l-83",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-83-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":["approval is on-chain and proposal-bound"]}],["$","li","l-83-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":["execution is on-chain and treasury-bound"]}],["$","li","l-83-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":["the manifest is encrypted off-chain"]}],["$","li","l-83-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":["the public chain shows aggregate settlement, not individual allocations"]}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","p","p-86",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["This is a governed encrypted payout system, not a fully private money rail."]}]}],"$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17"]}]}]}]
